html:
Exclusive to:  

The Cactus Flower is a Vegetable Food Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is obtained along with Cactus Flesh when harvesting a Cactus only during Summer. It can be consumed raw or used to make Flower Salad in a Crock Pot. It is also used to craft a Floral Shirt.

 Usage

Cannot be given directly.

×1.5

×5

×3

×3

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

“A pretty flower from a prickly plant.”
–Wilson
“Yet another flower.”
–Willow
“Is not worth it.”
–Wolfgang
“Even the knife-plant has a flower. Ugh.”
–Wendy
“REASON FOR BARRIER”
–WX-78
“Reminds me of Burroughs. A favorite at the library.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a wonder anything grows in this climate at all.”
–Woodie
“This part of the cactus is always nice.”
–Maxwell
“This flower would be quite edible provided I can cook it.”
–Wagstaff
“Beauty fröm brawn.”
–Wigfrid
“This part is nice.”
–Webber
“You ever seen anything as pretty?”
–Walani
“Such a pretty flower from such a prickly customer!”
–Warly
“Might put me eye out sniffin' ye.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS PRETTY NUM NUMS.”
–Wilba
“Yum”
–Wormwood
“A nice flowery projectile.”
–Wheeler
“Much less prickly.”
–Winona
“How pretty! I fear to touch it.”
–Wortox
“Glurph, ugly but tasty.”
–Wurt
“It looks nice, but getting it was a pain.”
–Walter
“I'm not stopping to smell it.”
–Wanda
The Cactus Flower is a Vegetable Food Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is obtained along with Cactus Flesh when harvesting a Cactus only during Summer. It can be consumed raw or used to make Flower Salad in a Crock Pot. It is also used to craft a Floral Shirt.

The '''Cactus Flower''' is a [[Vegetable]] [[Food]] [[Item]] from the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It is obtained along with [[Cactus Flesh]] when harvesting a [[Cactus]] only during [[Summer]]. It can be consumed raw or used to make [[Flower Salad]] in a [[Crock Pot]]. It is also used to craft a [[Floral Shirt]].
